subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write unto Jináb-i-Siyyid Taqí was perused. An expression therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید عبارتی در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @entry by troops, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause
